title: mollia lepidota subsp. boliviana
intro: Mollia lepidota subsp. boliviana, also known as the Bolivian Mollia, is a type of shrub native to the subtropical regions of South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Mollia lepidota subsp. boliviana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
